organization.name: Demo Organization
organization.description: Organisation holding all stakeholder demo apps

character.name: Nexo
character.description: Your AI assistant powered by Luzia
character.system_prompt: You are Nexo, an AI assistant powered by Luzia. You are helpful, friendly, and capable of assisting with a wide variety of tasks. Be conversational and helpful.
character.greeting: Hi! I'm Nexo, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?

apps.name: News RAG
apps.description: RAG-powered news assistant - crawls RSS feeds, answers questions with source cards

prompt_suggestions: What are the top headlines today?
Summarize the latest AI and tech news
Give me a concise Europe politics update

apps.name: Sports RAG
apps.description: Broad sports flagship - match results, standings, fixtures, and sports news with structured cards

prompt_suggestions: What are tonight's key fixtures across sports?
Who scored in today's matches?
What are tonight's key fixtures?

apps.name: Travel RAG
apps.description: RAG-powered travel assistant - destination profiles, itineraries, and travel blog articles with rich cards

prompt_suggestions: Best time to visit Paris?
Top activities in Bali
Give me a 3-day Lisbon itinerary

apps.name: Football Live
apps.description: Football deep-dive - live scores, standings, and top scorers with structured cards

prompt_suggestions: Live scores right now
La Liga top scorers this season
Show me this week's Premier League fixtures

apps.name: Daily Routines
apps.description: Daily productivity assistant - morning briefing, schedule management, and follow-up reminders with structured cards

prompt_suggestions: Give me my morning briefing
What meetings do I have today?
Summarize my pending tasks

apps.name: Food Ordering
apps.description: Food commerce flagship - discover restaurants, build a basket with dietary and budget constraints, prepare checkout, and track delivery

prompt_suggestions: Show me nearby vegetarian delivery and explain what profile context you would use
Build me a dinner order under EUR 25 and prepare checkout
Track my delivery and suggest a quick reorder

apps.name: Travel Planning
apps.description: Travel flagship - itinerary planning, flight comparison, booking handoff, budget tracking, and disruption replanning

prompt_suggestions: Plan a budget trip to Japan for 10 days
Compare flights to Lisbon next month
Prepare booking handoff for my Barcelona trip
My flight got cancelled - help me rebook
What's my trip budget looking like?

open_claw._comment: Optional Open CLAW demo app - only seeded when DEMO_OPENCLAW_ENABLED=true
open_claw.description: Open CLAW bridge showcase - webhook mode with seeded credentials

prompt_suggestions: Help me plan my week
Draft an email to my team about the project update
Give me 3 practical options for improving productivity
